title: Historical Packet 060 And Packet 061 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
historical_note: This record preserves one bounded Olares Phase 5 summary publication and host-mirror gate from before the canonical repo boundary moved to C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform on 2026-05-07. It is historical provenance, not a live publication instruction surface for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this record only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier Phase 5 Packet 062 publication and host-mirror gate record preserved here
objective: Publish Packet 060 closeout authority and Packet 061 decision authority through the parent-root boundary, then resynchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting commit without opening source/test execution or approving migration.
active_role: Olares Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Operator
dependency_note: Packet 060 published Packet 058 and Packet 059 authority in commit `500f2d21bcb2be542e37e66121fdd0d04e4b7639`. Packet 061 selected a later one-mutation-worker pilot under Packet 059 guardrails, but did not open source/test execution.
required_inputs: Packet 060 JSON closure state and publication handoff
Current routing handoff and roadmap state
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, remote, and cleanliness at `500f2d21bcb2be542e37e66121fdd0d04e4b7639`
Current `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count
constrained_outputs: A bounded parent-root publication commit and push containing only Packet 060 closeout authority, Packet 061 decision authority, Packet 062 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates needed for this gate
A host mirror resync record proving `/home/olares/code/apex` reached clean parity with the published commit by non-destructive fast-forward only
A publication and host-mirror resync handoff recording staged scope, commit hash, push result, host pre/post state, excluded drift, and the single next packet candidate
validation_steps: Reconfirm parent-root status and distinguish Packet 060/061 closure authority from unrelated `.vercelignore`, older Packet 039 drift, Packet 057 post-publication closure drift, and any unrelated local authority drift.
Reconfirm source files, package files, and lockfiles remain clean and outside publication scope.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at `500f2d21bcb2be542e37e66121fdd0d04e4b7639` before publication.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only Packet 060 closeout authority, Packet 061 decision authority, Packet 062 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates required by this gate.
Run `git diff --cached --check` and inspect staged path scope before committing.
Commit and push the bounded authority publication only if staged scope is exact.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit only if it can be done non-destructively.
Do not author or execute any pilot execution packet inside Packet 062.
preserved_boundaries: Packet 061 selected only a later pilot and did not open an execution lane.
No source/test execution opens in Packet 062.
No pilot execution packet is authored or executed inside Packet 062.
The only safe pilot shape remains one coordinator-owned governance/publication lane plus at most one mutation worker.
`apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts` remains shared-risk and single-owner, blocking simultaneous multi-worker mutation.

No migration, runtime/service mutation, package/lockfile mutation, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, remote rewrite, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation is authorized.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, source/test execution, migration, runtime/service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded authority publication and non-destructive `/home/olares/code/apex` mirror resync.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 062 published Packet 060 closeout authority, Packet 061 decision authority, Packet 062 draft authority, routing, and roadmap through commit `356dcfc32783765af27f2d70fbdd91b65d3129bb`, pushed `origin/clean-main`, and fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` from clean `500f2d21bcb2be542e37e66121fdd0d04e4b7639` to clean parity at `356dcfc32783765af27f2d70fbdd91b65d3129bb`. `.vercelignore`, older Packet 039 drift, and Packet 057 post-publication local closure drift were excluded. `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` was observed only and remained at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with status count 30.
next_action: Open only a separate Packet 063 if the lane is to author or execute the later one-mutation-worker source/test pilot under Packet 059 guardrails. Packet 062 itself does not authorize source/test execution.
